meaning: n.(鏁欏鐢ㄧ殑)鐢靛奖鑳剁墖,骞荤伅褰辩墖
examples: As mentioned earlier this is a very basic filmstrip control.
At that moment, it was like someone was showing a family filmstrip in my head.
In the Filmstrip, click the slide for which you want to add a transition effect.
You can keep swiping through your images or even pinch to zoom out and view all your images in a filmstrip view.
